title: rubus × hemigoniophylloides
intro: Rubus × hemigoniophylloides, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help protect against cardiovascular disease, certain types of cancer, and neurodegenerative disorders. Rubus × hemigoniophylloides can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
